request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people worry about civil defense spending, but let's be real - the real threat isn't some big government conspiracy, it's being unprepared when things go wrong. My neighbor lost everything in the last emergency because local services were stretched too thin. Basic preparedness isn't about paranoia, it's about common sense. We all pay for disasters one way or another - better to invest upfront than deal with the mess later. #CommunityFirst #SafetyMatters
